subcodes.first_line: Husayn and 'Abdu'l-Karím attained the presence of the Wronged One in those days when We were encompassed by the people of malice and hatred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر الحسین و عبدالکریم لدی المظلوم فی ایام احاطتنا اصحاب الغل و البغضاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
